text_blocks.text: upholds the sanctity of human life both of the
child and the mother. As a result, the church is
"reluctant to affirm abortion as an acceptable
practice," and condemns the use of late-term or
partial birth abortion except as a medical
necessity. The denomination as a whole is
committed to "assist[ing] the ministry of crisis
pregnancy centers and pregnancy resource centers
that compassionately help women find feasible
alternatives to abortion." Still, the denomination is
pro-choice and also "was a founding member of
record in support of the work of the Religious
